title: Wet-lab assay packet
source: validation-sheet ranked candidates: stimulated CD4+ effect, cell-type-specific, non-canonical
scope: assay planning, not accepted biological state

exclusion_criteria: canonical effector readout without upstream program shift

candidates.biological_question: Does PGGT1B gate the stimulated CD4+ activation program without acting as a broad housekeeping perturbation?
candidates.primary_readout: stimulated primary CD4+ T cells: activation-marker flow cytometry plus targeted RNA-seq at 8h and 48h
candidates.secondary_readout: compare Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr programs against non-targeting and pathway controls
candidates.decision_rule: advance only if stimulated knockdown shifts the activation program without a Rest-only or broad non-immune effect
exclusion_criteria: canonical effector readout without upstream program shift
evidence: 3014 DE genes under Stim8hr with on-target KD
175 DE genes at Rest
1 DE genes in K562 and not measured in RPE1
0 CollecTRI targets
